title: [Arc][ArcToLLVM] Add InsertRuntime pass
body:
Stacked on #9356 
Edit: Squashed and rebased on #9435 

This PR
* Adds the InsertRuntime pass to the Arc dialect
* Adapts the lowering of `SimInstantiateOp` in ArcToLLVM to call the runtime's state (de)allocation functions for instances that have a `RuntimeModelOp` assigned. 
* Adds the `ModelInfoAnalysis` helper struct, which allows us to use the `ModelInfo` metadata in both InsertRuntime and ArcToLLVM without having to recalculate it.

The InsertRuntime pass collects Arc models and instances in the processed MLIR module, and inserts the required function declarations and `RuntimeModelOps`. It also inserts calls to the runtime library's `onEval` hook before each  `SimStepOp`. The state (de)allocation is inherent to the `SimInstantiateOp`, so this has to be managed by ArcToLLVM for now.
